title: verbascum peregrinum
intro: Verbascum peregrinum, also known as Common Mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the mullein family and is native to Europe and Asia. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used for centuries in traditional medicine, due to their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum peregrinum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Verbascum peregrinum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
